articles.title: Daniel Cormier CLAPS BACK at Nate Diaz for callout on Theo Von's podcast: "You're AVERAGE!"
articles.description: Nate Diaz went on Theo Von's podcast, ‘This Past Weekend,’ and called out DC in his appearance, and Daniel Cormier is here to give his take on the viral clip. DC speaks on Nate's career and why it "doesn't compare" to the likes of Cormier's. Plus, DC addresses the money talk from Diaz, and why it's irrelevant today. And don't miss Cormier break down their fight resumes, calling Nate's career "AVERAGE." All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! Plus, full reaction to an insane UFC Seattle card featuring Alexa Grasso’s scary finish over Macy Barber, Terrance McKinney’s 24-second KO, and more. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join 🤖 Join The Discord: https://discord.gg/fbb9pc59 ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews

articles.description: Alexa Grasso is asked if she KO'd or submitted Maycee Barber in that insane finish sequence at UFC Fight Night 271. **Footage courtesy of UFC** Be sure to subscribe to receive updates when we post new content: https://www.youtube.com/@MMAJunkieOfficial?sub_confirmation=1 For the latest UFC and MMA news: https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com Part of the USA TODAY network: http://www.usatoday.com #UFCSeattle #UFC #AlexaGrasso

articles.title: Daniel Cormier REACTS to Joe Pyfer TKO vs. Israel Adesanya, Alexa Grasso INSANE KO vs. Maycee Barber
articles.description: Israel Adesanya got FINISHING by Joe Pyfer in an incredible night of UFC fights from Seattle, and Daniel Cormier IS BACK with another post-fight reaction live from the octagon! DC reacts to Izzy's TKO loss to Pyfer and BELIEVES Adesanya when he says he's not done with the sport of MMA and his career in the UFC. Plus, DC gives his take on Pyfer's win and why this victory gets him straight into the championship conversation. And don't miss Cormier discuss Alexa Grasso's CRAZY knockout and submission of Maycee Barber and what it was like to witness that in person. DC says that Grasso's finish was not only the finish of the year, but one of the most impressive finishes he's EVER SEEN in his time in the UFC. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Dana White: "Jon Jones Knows What Happened"
articles.description: Dana White defends his position on the Jon Jones negotiations at the UFC Seattle post-fight press conference. "You know, you think John Jones is clamoring to fight? Like John Jones is like, we have to give this guy three fights a year if he really wants to fight. Like, legally, we have to give him three fights a year if John Jones is chomping at the bit to fight. And if we don't, we have to pay him." articles.title: “Close The Division!” DJ And TJ On UFC Closing 125
'WHO WINS?!' BISPING picks UFC Seattle: Adesanya vs Pyfer | FINAL PREDICTIONS
articles.description: Michael Bisping gives his final full card predictions and breakdown for UFC Seattle: Adesanya vs Pyfer.
